title: Earth Atlas
description: Interactive 3D globe with country-level data overlays including life expectancy, CO2 emissions, renewable energy, and more. Built with React and Three.js.

title: Abalone
description: A polished 3D rendition of the classic marble-pushing board game. Features multiple camera angles, move previews, and complete rule enforcement.

title: Star Reaper '86
description: Retro side-scrolling shoot'em up with neon visuals, wave-based combat, boss encounters, and Xbox gamepad support.
